voices.ref_text: Hello! My name is Astra. Please keep sharing your screen; you may check it. Whenever you are ready, we can begin the interview.
Namaste! Mera naam Astra hai. Kripya apna drishya-patal saanjha rakhna jaari rakhiye, aap jaanch kar sakte hain. Jab bhi aap taiyar hon, hum sakshatkar aarambh kar sakte hain.
